scripts.build: npm -w @ods/shared run build && npm -w @ods/core run build && npm -w @ods/server-node run build
scripts.start:core: bash -lc 'if pm2 describe opencom-core >/dev/null 2>&1; then pm2 restart opencom-core --update-env; else pm2 start packages/core/dist/index.js --name opencom-core --update-env; fi'
scripts.start:node: bash -lc 'if pm2 describe opencom-node >/dev/null 2>&1; then pm2 restart opencom-node --update-env; else pm2 start packages/server-node/dist/index.js --name opencom-node --update-env; fi'
scripts.dev:voice-debug: DEBUG_HTTP=1 DEBUG_VOICE=1 LOG_LEVEL=debug npm -w @ods/server-node run dev
